package rulecoverage

func PositiveS3ListobjectsWithoutPagination() string {
    ruleID := "s3_listobjects_without_pagination"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`s3.ListObjectsV2` without `MaxKeys` or pagination in handler code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
